codex.form.shape-shifter-curse.anubis_wo: Форма шакала (фаза 1)
Проклятие видоизменило ваше тело. У вас появились черты, присущие шакалам, и время от времени вы слышите чей-то тихий шёпот.

Вы обнаружили, что ваши уши больше не там, где должны быть: они сместились ближе к макушке, а их заострённые кончики, покрытые золотистой шерстью, похожи на те, что бывают у призраков-волков, обитающих в пустыне.
На руках и ногах появилась пятнистая шерсть цвета, являющегося помесью чёрного и жёлтого цветов. Под шерстью можно заметить чёрные ногти, которые стали более твёрдыми.
Из вашего копчика вырос небольшой хвост. Он покрыт редкой шерстью, а его цвет постепенно переходит из тёмного к светлому на конце.

Вас стали беспокоить голоса в голове, а точнее время от времени появляющийся тихий шёпот. Вы не можете точно определить, что это за голос; похоже на то, что в вашем теле поселилась какая-то неизвестная сущность...

Сущность, поселившаяся в вашем теле, дала вам новые способности:
Вы ощущаете силу мертвецов, резонирующую с вашим телом. Когда вы находитесь под эффектом иссушения, ваши атаки распространяют его, накладывая на атакованных существ эффект "Иссушение II" длительностью в 2 секунды.
Чувствуя знакомую ауру, духи шакалов больше не будут нападать на вас.

Острые зубы позволяют вам легко пережёвывать кости.
Ваша пищеварительная система теперь больше напоминает пищеварительную систему падальщика: вы больше не подвержены эффектам голода и отравления, а гнилая плоть теперь лучше утоляет голод.

Сущность изменила строение вашего тела:
Когда вас атакуют враги, сила мертвецов пробуждается, и на вас накладывается эффект "Иссушение I" длительностью в 2,5 секунды.
Ваши новые силы малоэффективны против нежити, из-за чего наносимый им урон слегка снижен.

Вы желаете есть больше гнилой плоти.
Вы желаете остаться в пустыне.
Форма шакала (фаза 2)
Шёпот неконтролируемого духа шакала становится всё более отчётливым. Ваше тело приобретает всё больше черт, присущих шакалам.

Пятнистая шерсть, цвет которой переходит из чёрного к светло-бронзовому на руках и ногах, покрыла большую часть вашего туловища.
Структура ваших кистей и стоп изменилась. Они стали длинными и тонкими, на ладонях видны подушечки.

Вы теперь очень похожи на дружелюбного призрака.

Эксклюзивные предметы：[Ядро резонанса].

Ваше тело состоит из полупрозрачной светло-синей субстанции. Настолько лёгкой, что вы теперь можете парить.
Из вашего лба выросли пушистые антенны. Они очень гибкие и способны работать как детектор, который показывает местоположение существ поблизости.
Из вашей спины выросли крылья. Благодаря им вы можете парить. Ниже крыльев появились образования, напоминающие ленты. Их предназначение неизвестно. Может быть, они компенсируют отсутствие ног.

Призрачная природа вашей формы даёт вам новые способности:
Действия почти не тратят шкалу голода.
Удерживая кнопку прыжка, вы можете взлететь. Когда же вы перестанете держать эту кнопку, ваше тело будет медленно лететь вниз.

Отсутствие ног означает, что вы больше не можете ходить. Только парить.
Аметист странно резонирует с вами: в инвентаре вы можете использовать один блок аметиста на другом, чтобы создать осколки аметиста.
Вы чувствуете энергию других существ, видя их очертания в определённом радиусе. Нанесение урона частично восстанавливает ваше здоровье.
Благодаря улучшенному восприятию вы наносите больше урона с помощью лука.
Ваши крошечные размеры позволяют вам залезать в пространства в один блок. Также в вас теперь тяжелее попасть.

Призрачная природа формы обладает и некоторыми недостатками:
Использование способностей полёта очень быстро истощает шкалу голода.
Ваше тело не может получать энергию из еды. Единственный способ утолить голод - использовать кристаллы аметиста. Однако естественная регенерация хуже восстанавливает ваше здоровье.
Ваше тело настолько слабое, что, для того чтобы использовать инструменты, вам приходится держать их двумя руками. Скорость ломания блоков и количество наносимого урона уменьшены. Максимальное количество здоровья сильно уменьшено.
Ваше тело инертно. Из-за этого вам тяжелее остановиться во время полёта.
Ваши ноги исчезли. Вы больше не сможете экипировать поножи или ботинки.
Похоже, эта форма является "особенной": она почти не влияет на ваш рассудок и ощущается более нестабильной. Если бы вы захотели, вы легко обратили бы всё вспять.
The curse has begun affecting your body. Patches of chitinous shell have started to spread across your skin, and liquid silk is beginning to secrete from your new abdomen.

Hard carapace-like growths have begun to emerge on your body. They are composed of chitin — lightweight yet sturdy.
Liquid silk threads seep from your newly grown abdomen. You discover that you instinctively know how to weave compressed silk projectiles, which can be hurled to hinder your targets, and construct climbable web scaffolds.
A pair of carapace-covered protrusions has grown on each side of your torso and at the base of your abdomen. By focusing your mind, you find that you can command them to move slightly.

Unlike other forms, you sense that your transformation is now in a state of stagnation — a new instinct whispers to you: you will need specific catalytic materials, a safe location, and time to achieve a complete transformation.

Your body can now produce high-density silk projectiles — hold the primary ability key to charge and release to fire a web projectile, expending web value. Different effects occur based on charge level:

When hitting the side or bottom of a block, a non-sticky bridge web structure extends downward from the point of impact, which can be climbed.
When hitting a creature, it inflicts Slowness and Weakness.

Your body is no longer affected by poison.
You are unhindered by cobwebs. You can climb webs and sense entities caught within them.

Your digestive system is shifting toward one better suited for an arthropod predator, reducing the saturation you gain from non-meat foods.
Weapons enchanted with Bane of Arthropods deal increased damage to you.
The appendage protrusions on your rear make it impossible to wear leggings.

For some reason, you feel that your form is less influenced by the lunar tides... The Cursed Moon and ordinary catalysts cannot exert sufficient influence on your current form.
Instead, the idea of weaving
[Dew Covered Cobweb] and using them to construct a silk nest begins to captivate you.
First, you need to collect
[Silk Dew] dropped by Ensorcelled Spiders, and then find a safe and secluded place...
An enormous silk cocoon, trembling from time to time, is wrapped within a web nest.

Catalyzed by the Dew Covered Cobweb, your abdomen secretes copious amounts of silk, weaving into a sturdy cocoon that completely envelops you.
It feels extremely damp all around. You try to will your body to move, but only formless chaos answers you... Are you submerged in some kind of gooley fluid? Or are you the fluid itself?

You cannot describe what you are feeling right now. The only certainty is that within the silk cocoon, your body is undergoing some kind of intense transformation.
You have no idea how to perceive your body as it is now. All you can do is wait.
You have no idea how to perceive your body as it is now. All you can do is wait.
Wrapped within the silk cocoon, the only thing you can do is wait for the transformation to complete, surrounded by Dew Covered Cobweb.
As a transformed arthropod creature, your body retains an appearance similar to its original form, yet the way it functions beneath the carapace is completely different.

Your skin has transformed into a chitinous exoskeleton. It has replaced your original bones, supporting the movement of your now-segmented limbs. Pale, bristly hairs have grown from your neck, joints, and the tips of your limbs, partially compensating for the tactile sensation you have lost beneath your rigid carapace.
An extra pair of eyes has grown above your original eyes, allowing you to see clearly even in darkness. The appendages of your head and mandibles have elongated into two pairs of pedipalps, further enhancing your senses.
The protrusions on the sides of your torso have grown into a pair of fully functional extra arms. Though relatively weak, they are strong enough to hold tools and aid you in your adventures. Meanwhile, the protrusions at the junction of your abdomen and abdomen have also developed into an extra pair of hind limbs. However, they cannot yet support your body — they merely cling to your abdomen, curving slightly upward.
Your body no longer craves solid food; instead, it seeks the liquefied nutrients of prey digested externally. The method of weaving Nutrient Dissolve Cocoon sacs for this purpose has already been etched into your instincts.

Unlike ordinary spiders, your further-developed abdomen is not used to house organs, but to store liquid silk. Thanks to more specialized spinnerets, you can now weave higher-density compressed silk projectiles — dense enough to form climbable silk towers.

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: [Auxiliary Sword], [Auxiliary Pickaxe], [Auxiliary Axe], [Shield (Extra Arm Slot)], [Totem of Undying (Extra Arm Slot)], [Nutrient Sac (Extra Arm Slot)], [Venom Spindle]

Hold the primary active power key to charge and release to fire a web projectile. Different effects occur based on charge level:
When hitting the side or bottom of a block, a non-sticky bridge web structure extends downward from the point of impact, which can be climbed.
Additionally, when hitting the top of a block, a tower bridge web structure can be generated upward. When hitting a creature, you can inflict Slowness and Weakness.

You possess an extra pair of arms. By equipping different special items in the Trinkets extra hand slot, you can gain various beneficial effects.
You can eat string to replenish web value. By holding string in your inventory and right-clicking another string to expend a small amount of web value to craft cobwebs.
By holding a cobweb in your inventory and right-clicking a composter, you can expend a larger amount of web value to create a Nutrient Dissolve Cocoon — meat placed will be converted into Nutrient Sacs that you can consume.

Your transformed spider body grants you immunity to poison and the ability to freely climb the sides of blocks. The extra pair of eyes can capture faint traces of light, allowing you to see clearly even in darkness.
You are unhindered by cobwebs. You can climb webs and sense entities caught within them.
Spiders do not see you as an enemy.

The newly grown pair of legs attached to your abdomen are not yet structured for supporting your body; instead, they slow your movement.
Although you can still gain some nutrition from meat, you have discovered that externally digested Nutrient Sacs are the more suitable food for you.
Weapons enchanted with Bane of Arthropods deal increased damage to you.
Your chitinous carapace and the bristles upon it fear flame — you take increased damage from fire.
Due to the obstruction of your new appendages, you can only wear a helmet and boots.
Village Iron Golems see you as an enemy and will actively attack you.

Something inside you stirs... your transformation hasn't reached its end...
For some reason, you feel that your form is less influenced by the lunar tides...
The Cursed Moon and ordinary catalysts cannot exert sufficient influence on your current form. However, a Resonant Catalyst should be enough to bring your transformation to the next stage... though this process is likely to be permanent.
You're NOT actually considering this, are you?
For cave explorers, when you see blue web structures, it's best to be careful... Unless, of course, the one who made them is your ally.

Your body has fully metamorphosed into a structure suited for a multi-legged arthropod. To support the added weight, your hind legs no longer hang in the air, and your original bipedal limbs have tilted forward, forming a more stable quadrupedal stance — better suited for explosive forward lunges than sustained movement.
Your extra pair of arms naturally tuck against the front of your torso when not in use. You have not yet fully grown accustomed to their presence.
Another pair of simple eyes has grown from the sides of your head, extending your field of vision to a panoramic view of your surroundings. They allow you to detect even the faintest stirrings around you, even in darkness.
Beneath the bristly hairs covering your neck, you sense that your mouth has also transformed into a short tubular structure unfit for chewing. Now you can only draw energy from externally digested fluid nutrients.

Your greatly enlarged abdomen stores vast quantities of liquid silk. Compressed silk projectiles can form silk cocoons that efficiently ensnare struck targets. Beyond that, you can now spray liquid silk directly from your spinnerets, causing it to rapidly expand and solidify into a tough, sponge-like "bridge" ahead of you.
With these, you can effortlessly traverse complex terrain, leaving your targets with nowhere to run.

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: [Auxiliary Sword], [Auxiliary Pickaxe], [Auxiliary Axe], [Shield (Extra Arm Slot)], [Totem of Undying (Extra Arm Slot)], [Nutrient Sac (Extra Arm Slot)], [Venom Spindle]

Hold the primary active power key to charge and release to fire a web projectile. Different effects occur based on charge level:
When hitting the side or bottom of block, a non-sticky bridge web structure extends downward from the point of impact, which can be climbed.
When hitting the top of block, a tower bridge web structure can be generated upward.
When hitting a creature, you can inflict Slowness, Weakness, and "Entangled": as "Entangled" continues to accumulate, it will eventually become "Cocooning", make it unable to move.
Melee attacks against "Cocooning" creatures fill some web value; creatures that die under the "Cocooning" effect may drop Nutrient Sacs.
Hold the secondary active power key to charge and release to generate a horizontal silk bridge. Its length and width vary based on charge level.

You possess an extra pair of arms. By equipping different special items in the Trinkets extra hand slot, you can gain various beneficial effects.
You can eat string to replenish web value. By holding string in your inventory and right-clicking another string, you can craft cobwebs.
By holding a cobweb in your inventory and right-clicking a composter, you can create a Nutrient Dissolve Cocoon — meat placed inside will be converted into Nutrient Sacs that you can consume.
Your fully transformed multi-legged spider body grants you night vision, immunity to poison, and the ability to step up one block of height. It also grants you the ability to freely climb the sides of blocks.
You are unhindered by cobwebs. You can climb webs and sense entities caught within them.
Spiders do not see you as an enemy.

Your fully transformed multi-legged spider body is no longer suited for sustained actions requiring endurance. Your movement and sprinting speed are greatly reduced, and you can no longer jump vertically to a height of one block as before. However, as a replacement, you can lunge forward while sprinting.
Your spider digestive system means you can only gain hunger from externally digested Nutrient Sacs. Additionally, weapons enchanted with Bane of Arthropods deal increased damage to you.
Your chitinous carapace and the bristles upon it fear flame — you take increased damage from fire.
Aside from a helmet, you cannot wear normal armor.
Village Iron Golems see you as an enemy and will actively attack you.
